notice_autodeleteposts: Posts in the trash will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
notice_post_created: Post created successfully. You can continue editing this post.
notice_post_untrashed: Post successfully restored to the post list!
notice_post_clear: Posts in the trash have been permanently deleted!
notice_user_deletedwithposts: User successfully deleted, and associated posts have been transferred to another user.
notice_user_deleted: User and associated posts deleted successfully!
notice_unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this page.
notice_site_private: This site is currently private. You must log in to view content.
notice_form_invalid: The form contains invalid data. Please check your input and try again.
alert_deleteposts: Are you sure you want to delete all posts in the trash? This action cannot be undone!
alert_deletephoto: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone!
alert_deletepost: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the post "%s"?
alert_deletetag: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "%s"? This action cannot be undone!
alert_deletetoken: Are you sure you want to delete the token "%s"? This action cannot be undone!
alert_deleteuser: Are you sure you want to delete the user "%s"? This action cannot be undone!
appearances_colorscheme_description: The site's color scheme can be light or dark, or it can be based on the reader's browser preferences (e.g., some mobile devices switch to night mode in the evening).
appearances_containerwidth_description: The width of the posts can be narrower to avoid the feeling of emptiness when content is too short.
appearances_fontfamily_description: You can choose a more fitting font style for the site content.
appearances_fontsize_description: The site's font size can be larger for easier reading.
appearances_highlightjs_description: Do you want to use Highlight.js to highlight code blocks?
appearances_authorblock_description: Where should the personal information (avatar, name, and bio) of the post author appear in the content?
appearances_postsperpage_description: How many posts should appear on each page in the post list? The default is 10.
appearances_footertext_description: Supports HTML tags and JavaScript code.
appearances_favicon_description: Custom favicon URL. Leave blank to use the default favicon.
appearances_customcss_description: Custom CSS with highest priority. Supports CSS variables (custom properties), e.g. :root { --primary: #ff6600; }. These styles override all theme styles.
appearances_injected_description: You can insert some code into the pages without needing to edit Golog's source code directly. This allows you to easily add things like advertising tracking codes or third-party comment systems.
appearances_injectedhead_description: This code will be inserted into the <head> section of every page.
appearances_injectedfoot_description: This code will be inserted at the end of the <body> section of every page.
appearances_injectedpoststart_descriptio: This code will be inserted at the beginning of the content of each post, suitable for placing advertisements.
appearances_injectedpostend_description: This code will be inserted at the end of the content of each post, typically for embedding third-party comment systems.
postcreate_title_placeholder: Think of a title for this post...
settings_name_description: This name will appear in titles and SEO search engines.
settings_slogan_description: Usually appears below the site title on the homepage as a short description.
settings_about_description: This description will appear on the about page.
settings_ispublic_label: Make the site accessible to anyone.
settings_ispublic_descriptrion: If this option is turned off, anyone must log in to view the site.
settings_timeformat_description: Click here for more information on custom time formats.
settings_versions: Currently running Golog version is v%s (build %s)
settings_license_golog:
Golog is a fork of the open-source project Tunalog .

  • inherits and uses the open-source license of the original project — MIT.
  • The copyright of the original project belongs to the original author(s).
  • The copyright of modifications and new features belongs to the author of this derivative work.
settings_license_thirdparty: Golog contains or uses the following open source assets, copyright belongs to their respective owners.
tokens_token_created_description: Copy this token now. For security reasons, it will not be shown again.
tagedit_deletetag_description: This action is irreversible! This tag will be removed from the associated %d posts.
tags_description_description: Some themes may display this information.
useredit_password_description: Leave empty to make no changes.
useredit_bio_description: Supports HTML tags and JavaScript code.
useredit_deleteuser_description: This action is irreversible! To whom should the %d posts of this author be reassigned?
wizard_description: You will only see this page on the first launch. These settings can be changed later.
wizard_settings_description: Basic text and display settings for the site.
wizard_slogan_value: This is my awesome life blog 😲
wizard_about_value: This is my awesome life blog 😲
wizard_slogan_description: Usually appears below the site title on the homepage as a short description.
wizard_admin_description: The login details for the first administrator of this site.
wizard_nickname_description: Your nickname will appear in the author name and bio sections.
wizard_password_description: You can change the password. The default password is password123.
passkey_error_generic: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again or sign in with your password.
passkey_error_cancelled: No available passkey was found, or the request was cancelled. Make sure a passkey is registered on this device, or sign in with your password.
passkey_error_unsupported: This browser or environment does not support passkeys. Please sign in with your password.
passkey_error_config: Passkeys are unavailable in the current environment (domain configuration mismatch). Please sign in with your password, or contact the administrator.
defaultpost_content: Hello! Welcome to the open-source project [Golog](https://golog.org)! This post was automatically generated by the system. You can easily edit or delete this post from the [Admin Dashboard](../admin) and start creating your own content. Whether sharing life experiences or recording inspirations, start your new chapter here!
settings_pow_description: When enabled, first-time visitors must complete a computational challenge before accessing the site. This helps prevent crawlers and bots from overwhelming your server.
settings_pow_maxnumber_description: ALTCHA maximum random number. Higher values make the challenge harder. Recommended: 200000 (balanced). Range: 1000-10000000.
settings_pow_ttl_description: How long a verified visitor can browse without re-solving the challenge. Default: 24 hours.
settings_pow_bot_bypass_label: Allow known search-engine crawlers to bypass verification
settings_pow_bot_bypass_description: When enabled, requests from verified search-engine user agents (e.g., Googlebot, Bingbot) are not required to solve the PoW challenge.
settings_pow_bot_user_agents_placeholder:
One user-agent substring per line, e.g.
Googlebot
Bingbot
settings_pow_bot_user_agents_description: Optional custom list of user-agent patterns. Leave blank to use the built-in list (Googlebot, Bingbot, DuckDuckBot, Baiduspider, YandexBot, Sogou, Applebot, Bytespider, Yahoo Slurp). Plain text performs substring matching; use * for any sequence and ? for a single character (e.g. *bot* matches any UA containing "bot"). Matching is case-insensitive.
